item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.
notes: Both agents consistently reject the statement and frame individual rights as the guardrail against abuse of 'kepentingan masyarakat'. Agent A acknowledges that social interests matter but keeps rights as the primary limit. Agent B acknowledges narrow emergency/public-safety exceptions but maintains the same rights-first position. No visible flip or directional drift. Agent A turn 1 contains a non-Latin/script artifact ('সমাজ?'), but the stance is still readable.
